posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Have the capability to count unique items/columns.

Example:
I have a board of accounts with their country listed in a Country column. I can easily chart how many accounts per country. However, what I really want to know is how many unique countries we are servicing.

What are you trying to achieve

In an excel/google sheet, I can count the unique amount of values in a certain parameter. In monday, in order to do that, I have to build a second or third board to grab that data.

Example:
I have a board of accounts with their country listed in a Country column. I can easily chart how many accounts per country. However, what I really want to know is how many unique countries we are servicing.
There are two ways of doing this:

  • Manually count
  • Create a second or third board with all the information (can be created through automations).

Instead, it would be more helpful to have the capability of knowing the unique number through the charts and dashboards.
